case_title: LINDA PREMICK VS. TRICIA WEAVER MOSS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG FILED BY PREMICK, LINDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,212.00 FILED BY PREMICK, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, TRICIA WEAVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PREMICK, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, TRICIA WEAVER
REMARK: CONTINUANCE ORDER MAILED RO PLAINTIFF RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, NO SUCH NUMBER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-17-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.NO APPREANCE ARE MADE. DEFENDANT TRICIA WEAVER MOSS MADE AN UNAUTHORIZED COURT APPEARANCE ON 11-02-2021 SEEKING A CONTINUANCE ON THIS MATTER DUE A PERSONAL EMERGENCY AND FOR INABILITY TO APPEAR IN COURT ON 11-03-2021 @ 1:30 PM. DEFENDANT WAS INFORMED THAT REQUEST WAS UNTIMELY AND THIS IS NOT THE PROPER PROCEDURE FOR THIS REQUEST. COURT ALLOWS DEFENDANTS REQUEST. THIS WILL BE THE FINAL CONTINUANCE, NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES ARE ALLOWED FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAS CALLED AND NOTIFIED OF THE CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF SELECTS THE DATE OF FEB-17-2022 AT 3:30 PM. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG, CLERK A. DATT, NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCAN DOCUMENT).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-17-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, TRICIA WEAVER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2021 - CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TRICIA WEAVER MOSS APPEARED IN COURT ON SEP-01-21 AND MADE AN ORAL REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. (SEE NOTES) COURT ALLOWS DEFENDANTS ORAL REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF IS CALLED AT THE NUMBER ON FILE IN IJS AND IS NOTIFIED OF THIS CONTINUANCE. NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE IS MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LINDA PREMICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRICIA WEAVER MOSS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREMICK, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSS, TRICIA WEAVER $3,212.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,277.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
